message:
refactor(cli): extract print_inspect_output helper from inspect function

Move the inline plain-text rendering logic for InspectOutput (both Ext4
and Btrfs variants) out of the inspect() function body into a dedicated
print_inspect_output() helper. Adds Btrfs subvolume and snapshot listing
to the plain-text output path (previously only available in JSON mode).
No behavioral change for JSON output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
